# PackRoute

> Dog walking route planning and operations software for adventure dog hiking teams.

PackRoute helps small adventure dog hiking and group dog walking businesses run pickup routes, assign drivers, and keep customers updated with automated SMS — without spreadsheet chaos or constant "where is my dog?" texts.

Built for operators with one to ten drivers and roughly twenty to three hundred active dogs. Not a consumer marketplace or generic pet-sitting app.

## Product summary

- **Route planning:** Build pickup routes, set stop order, adjust today or tomorrow without losing long-term schedules.
- **Scheduling:** Morning and afternoon routes, recurring dogs, as-needed bookings, multi-driver days.
- **Driver workflow:** Mobile browser Today view — no app store required.
- **Customer SMS:** Night-before reminders, en-route ETAs, pickup and drop-off confirmations, schedule-change requests reviewed by the office first.
- **Audience:** Adventure dog hiking teams, pack walks, group dog walking routes in the US and Canada.

## Key pages

- [Home — product overview](https://packroute.app/)
- [Dog walking software — route planning & customer updates](https://packroute.app/dog-walking-software)
- [Adventure dog hiking software — group hikes & pickup operations](https://packroute.app/adventure-dog-hiking-software)
- [Contact — book a demo or ask a question](https://packroute.app/contact)

## FAQ highlights

- PackRoute is operations software for adventure dog hiking and group dog walking businesses.
- Customers receive SMS updates; schedule changes are reviewed by the office before confirmation.
- Drivers use a mobile web app — no separate driver app install.
- Pricing is available on request via the contact page.

## Contact

- Email: hello@packroute.app
